title: Analysis Engine - Technical, Sentiment, Event, News Analyzers with Weighted Scoring
scope: services/analysis_engine.py, services/technical_analyzer.py, services/sentiment_analyzer.py, services/event_processor.py, services/news_analyzer.py, services/recommendation_scorer.py
description: Build the core analysis engine that combines technical analysis, sentiment analysis, event processing, and news impact into a unified recommendation score using weighted scoring algorithm.

files.change: Create AnalysisEngine class that orchestrates all analyzers and produces AIAnalysisResult
Create TechnicalAnalyzer that calculates technical_score (0-100) from price, volume, MA, RSI, MACD indicators. Reuses BackTestResult from existing code.
Create SentimentCollector that calculates sentiment_score (-1 to 1) from sector sentiment and HSGT flow data
Create EventProcessor that extracts event_signals and calculates event_score from dividends, repurchases, forecasts, announcements
Create NewsImpactAnalyzer that calculates news_impact (-1 to 1) from news sentiment analysis

Create RecommendationScorer that combines all scores using weights: technical(0.35) + sentiment(0.25) + event(0.25) + news(0.15), outputs recommendation (买入/持有/卖出/观望), confidence (0-1), risk_level (高/中/低)

implementation: Create TechnicalAnalyzer: calculate technical_score from RSI, MACD, Moving Averages, Volume ratios. Score 0-100 based on indicator values.
Create SentimentCollector: aggregate sector sentiment from stock_board_industry_spot_em and HSGT flow from stock_hsgt_em. Normalize to -1 to 1 scale.
Create EventProcessor: parse company events (dividends, repurchases, forecasts, announcements), assign positive/negative weights, calculate event_score.
Create NewsImpactAnalyzer: analyze news headlines and content sentiment using keyword extraction and scoring. Output news_impact in -1 to 1 range.
Create RecommendationScorer: implement weighted sum algorithm with weights [0.35, 0.25, 0.25, 0.15], map composite score to recommendation, calculate confidence, assess risk_level.
Create AnalysisEngine: orchestrate all analyzers, handle errors gracefully, call LLM service for insight enhancement, persist result to database.
Write comprehensive unit tests for each analyzer and integration tests for AnalysisEngine

reference.pattern: Follow service layer pattern in services/watchlist_service.py, reuse BackTestResult from existing backtest code
reference.examples: Reuse technical indicator calculations from existing backtest module, sentiment scoring from market analysis

criteria: TechnicalAnalyzer outputs technical_score (0-100) within expected range
SentimentCollector outputs sentiment_score (-1 to 1) within expected range
EventProcessor outputs event_signals list with severity ratings
NewsImpactAnalyzer outputs news_impact (-1 to 1) within expected range
RecommendationScorer produces: recommendation (4 options), confidence (0-1), risk_level (3 levels)
AnalysisEngine orchestrates all components and persists to AIAnalysisResult
Unit tests: test_technical_analyzer, test_sentiment_analyzer, test_event_processor, test_news_analyzer, test_recommendation_scorer, test_analysis_engine

rationale.chosen_approach: Modular analyzers with single orchestrator enables independent testing and future extension
alternatives_considered: Single monolithic AnalysisEngine - rejected, harder to test individual components
Separate microservices - rejected, over-engineering for this scope
decision_factors: Testability: each analyzer can be unit tested in isolation
Maintainability: weights and algorithms can be adjusted independently
Extensibility: new data sources can be added as new analyzers
rationale.tradeoffs: More files to maintain; IPC overhead between analyzers is minimal for this use case

manual_checks: Verify scoring algorithm matches specification exactly
Test edge cases: all zeros, all max values
success_metrics: All unit tests pass with 100% success rate
Score calculation matches expected values within 0.01 precision

risks.description: News sentiment scoring may not accurately reflect real market impact
risks.mitigation: Use keyword-based scoring with domain-specific financial vocabulary, allow manual tuning
risks.fallback: Assign neutral news_impact (0) when confidence is low

risks.description: Weight tuning needed for optimal recommendations
risks.mitigation: Make weights configurable via environment variables, implement A/B testing framework
risks.fallback: Use default weights; provide admin interface for weight adjustment

interfaces: Analyzer: analyze(data: dict) -> AnalyzerResult - base interface for all analyzers
functions: async def analyze_stock(symbol: str, date_range: tuple[date, date]) -> AIAnalysisResult - main entry point
def calculate_weighted_score(scores: list[float], weights: list[float]) -> float - scoring algorithm
def map_score_to_recommendation(score: float) -> str - score to recommendation mapping

classes.name: AnalysisEngine
classes.purpose: Orchestrates all analyzers and LLM enhancement

classes.name: RecommendationScorer
classes.purpose: Combines component scores into final recommendation
